name: My workers comp for hearing loss got denied, can I appeal?

mainEntity.name: My workers comp for hearing loss got denied, can I appeal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, appeal with better medical proof and lawyer.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, appeal denied claims with more evidence; most states allow hearings and further reviews.[5] Context: Denials often cite causation or age; new medical opinions reverse them.[4][5] Key factors: Stronger audiograms, exposure docs, negligence proof.[1] Practical guidance: File appeal within deadlines (e.g., Utah 20 days), get lawyer for representation; request OSHA records.[2][5] Persistence pays.

description: Yes, appeal with better medical proof and lawyer.[5]
